title: The Tale of Igor's Campaign (Complete)
description: The full text of medieval Russia's greatest literary work — Prince Igor's disastrous campaign, his capture, escape, and the mourning of Yaroslavna.
introduction: The full text of medieval Russia's greatest literary work — Prince Igor's disastrous campaign, his capture, escape, and the mourning of Yaroslavna.

translation.text: O Russian land, you are already beyond the hill! The wind, grandson of Stribog, blows arrows against Igor's brave warriors. The earth rumbles, the rivers flow muddy. Dust covers the fields. The banners speak. The Polovtsians come from the Don and from the sea.
